# opnsense_quagga_ospf_general (Resource)

Manages OSPF (IPv4) general configuration on OPNsense (FRR). Singleton resource. Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `carp_demote` (Boolean) Demote CARP if OSPF is not converged. Defaults to `false`.
- `cost_reference` (Number) Reference bandwidth in Mbit for cost calculation (0 = unset).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable OSPF. Defaults to `false`.
- `log_adjacency_changes` (Boolean) Log neighbor adjacency changes. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default` (Boolean) Originate a default route. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default_always` (Boolean) Always originate the default route even if not present. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default_metric` (Number) Metric for the originated default route (0 = unset).
- `passive_interfaces` (Set of String) Interfaces to mark passive (no OSPF hellos).
- `router_id` (String) OSPF router ID (IPv4 address).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (always `ospf`).
